data.title: Lam Research Stock Climbs After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Results: Details
data.description: Lam Research reports its first-quarter results after Wednesday's closing bell. Here's a look at the details from the report.

data.title: Examining the Future: Barfresh Food Group's Earnings Outlook
ServiceNow Q3 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, 'Remarkable' Momentum Driven By AI And More
data.description: ServiceNow reports third-quarter revenue of $2.797 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $2.743 billion. The company reports third-quarter adjusted earnings of $3.72 per share, beating analyst estimates of $3.46 per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Tilray CEO Irwin Simon On Why US Cannabis Rescheduling Won't Change A Billion-Dollar Play
data.description: CEO Irwin Simon addressed the recent quarterly performance and challenges the company faces in both domestic and international markets.
